extraction: pdf.js 4.10.38 getTextContent(); items joined one-per-line ('\n'), matching js/app.js inspectPage()
notes: Redacted extracted text layer of a Commerce Control merchant statement (pdf.js 4.10.38, items joined one-per-line, matching js/app.js inspectPage). Merchant-identifying information (name, contact, address, MID, batch/account numbers) has been replaced with placeholders; the exact fee-row structure, descriptions, amounts, page numbers, and line ordering are preserved so the extraction failure and its fix reproduce exactly. Printed statement fee total $1,501.57 = Interchange Charges/Program Fees ($1,403.91) + Service Charges ($85.58) + Fees ($12.08). Interchange/program charges are a real component of the total, not a duplicate.
